name: NEXUS-MD
description: Full-featured WhatsApp Bot — AI chat, sticker maker, media downloader, group management, antidelete, autocall block, analytics dashboard and more.

SESSION.description: Paste your SESSION_ID received after linking your WhatsApp — get it free at https://nexs-session-1.replit.app then paste here. Required for the bot to connect.

SESSION_ID.description: Same as SESSION — alternative key accepted. Paste your NEXUS-MD:~... session string here.

ADMIN_NUMBERS.description: Comma-separated bot owner/admin phone numbers WITHOUT the + sign. Example: 254706535581,254781346242

BOTNAME.description: The display name for your bot. Example: NEXUS-MD

BAD_WORD.description: Comma-separated list of words that trigger the anti-badword kick. Example: fuck,pussy,slut,bitch

MENU_TYPE.description: Menu display style — enter VIDEO, IMAGE or LINK.

HEROKU_API.description: Your Heroku API key. Allows the bot to update its own config vars and restart dynos without redeploying. Get it from https://dashboard.heroku.com/account

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string — auto-added by the Heroku Postgres add-on. Leave blank; Heroku fills this in automatically.

APP_URL.description: Auto-detected from HEROKU_APP_NAME — leave blank unless you use a custom domain (e.g. https://mybot.herokuapp.com).

PAIR_SITE_URL.description: External pairing site for generating session IDs.

PORT.description: HTTP port for the web dashboard. Heroku assigns this automatically. For panels: default 5000.

PRINT_QR.description: Set to 'true' to print the WhatsApp QR code in the terminal (useful on VPS/panel with console access).
